name: MSI MAG B550 TOMAHAWK ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B550 Chipset - Supports DDR4-5100+(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0/3.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - DisplayPort - HDMI - Realtek 2.5G LAN - Realtek GbE LAN - Flash BIOS Button
